name_en: Top-tier Original Replicas Exclusive Real Photos📷Upgraded Version!【Nova PM Handbag】M13140 Black Leather
name_cn:
Top-tier Original Replicas Exclusive Real Photos📷Upgraded Version!【Nova PM Handbag】M13140 Black Leather
Introducing the new Nova PM, a stylish and refined handbag that made its debut on the Cruise 2025 runway. The Nova is crafted from noble calfskin with a subtle glazed finish, conveying bold yet relaxed elegance. Rich signature details, including the LV monogram and Monogram canvas decoration. Use the sliding gold chain to find the perfect drop when styling.
Size: 20 x 9 x 31 cm
